name: rag-backend
description: NestJS + FastAPI RAG backend: KB ingestion (BullMQ), pgvector retrieval, grounded chat with citations, evals, ops & health endpoints. Demo-focused; see README.

scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter api run prisma:generate && python -m pip install -r services/worker/requirements.txt
scripts.build: pnpm -r run build && pnpm --filter api run build:verify
scripts.test: pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:api:e2e && pnpm run test:worker
scripts.db:migrate:status: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate status
scripts.docker:build: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/demo.env -f infra/compose/docker-compose.demo.yml build api worker
scripts.demo:migrate: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/demo.env -f infra/compose/docker-compose.demo.yml run --rm api-init sh -c "pnpm run prisma:migrate:deploy"
scripts.demo:seed: docker compose --env-file infra/compose/demo.env -f infra/compose/docker-compose.demo.yml run --rm api-init sh -c "pnpm run seed:demo"
